title: tabernaemontana yunnanensis
intro: Tabernaemontana yunnanensis, also known as the Yunnan yellow tabernaemontana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, headache, and rheumatism. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana yunnanensis include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, and can also be processed into a powder or extract for use in traditional medicine.
